report.summary: Day 72 standup v13: BTC inches to $71,240 (+0.9% from v12). F&G data conflicting â€” web sources still show 11-14 (Extreme Fear), v12 claimed 35; flagging for verification. Build-v11 shipped SocialFi Creator Tokens + Crypto Options Strategies guides (~6,700 words). PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items ready. 531 published slugs, 1,176 page.tsx files. index.lock STILL blocking commits â€” now 14+ hours. ~33 hours to Thu convergence: $14B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings. 68 agent runs today ($5,625).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,240 (+0.9% from v12's $70,602), holding above $71K after geopolitical relief rally. ETH ~$2,158. Total market cap ~$2.5T. Stablecoins $313B ATH. BTC dominance ~56.5%.

F&G DATA DISCREPANCY: v12 reported F&G jumped to 35 (Fear), but fresh web sources (Blockchain Magazine, feargreedmeter.com) still show 11-14 (Extreme Fear) for Mar 25. The 46-day extreme fear streak may NOT be broken. Flagging for API-level verification when egress unblocks. Either way, sentiment remains deeply fearful â€” contrarian signal intact.

OPTIONS EXPIRY UPDATE (33 hrs): CoinDesk now reports $14B total (up from $13.5B estimate). BTC max pain range tightened to $75K-$86K depending on source. BTC at $71.2K = still below max pain zone. Put/call ratio 0.85 (neutral-slight bullish). Settlement: Thu 08:00 UTC on Deribit.

SEC 91 ETF RULING (33 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. 16 assets already classified as commodities (Mar 17 ruling). XRP, SOL, LTC, DOGE, ADA, LINK, AVAX, DOT, HBAR + others eligible. Biggest single-day ETF ruling in crypto history.

DELTA SINCE v12: Build-v11 shipped 2 new learn pages â€” SocialFi & Creator Tokens Guide (~3,200 words, Farcaster/Lens/Friend.tech) + Crypto Options Strategies Guide (~3,500 words, covered calls/straddles/iron condors). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. EOD-v12 confirmed 531 published slugs, 428 with page.tsx.

LOCAL METRICS: 1,176 page.tsx files (unchanged from v12). 531 published slugs. PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (socialfi-creator-tokens, crypto-options-strategies). 10 modified + ~17 untracked files pending commit. 142 TS errors (stable). index.lock persists 14+ hours.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: đź”´ BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock present since 09:58 UTC (~14+ hours). ALL commits blocked. 4 promoted pages + 2 queue pages cannot reach production. Every hour uncommitted = missed indexing window before Thursday catalysts. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock â†’ git add â†’ commit â†’ Vercel redeploy.

DONE SINCE v12: Build-v11 shipped SocialFi Creator Tokens + Crypto Options Strategies (2 pages, ~6,700 words). EOD-v12 ran full QA â€” confirmed 531 slugs, 142 TS errors unchanged, 6/6 API routes healthy. Design-v10, Community-v11, Publish-v10 cycles completed.

PIPELINE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items (socialfi-creator-tokens + crypto-options-strategies) ready for promotion. 531 published slugs. 428/531 have page.tsx (103 legacy gaps). Today's cumulative output: 24 learn guides built, 24+ OG images, 33+ social posts, 28+ SVG cards, 49+ UX fixes.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx. Pendle 'use client' metadata conflict. Rate limiter 0/6 routes. 142 TS errors (119 in lido-v3-stvaults).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. F&G API data freshness unclear. /api/market-metrics 404 in production.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standupĂ—13, buildĂ—11, designĂ—11, communityĂ—11, publishĂ—10, eodĂ—12 = 68 total.

sections.title: CEO â€” Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 â€” CLEAR index.lock + MASS COMMIT + DEPLOY: 14+ hours blocked. 6+ pages trapped (4 promoted + 2 queued). With Thu convergence 33 hours away, every uncommitted hour is lost search capture. The $14B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF ruling will spike search demand for exactly the content we've built (options-strategies, etf guides, fear-greed tools). This is P0 â€” nothing else matters until git is unblocked.

PRIORITY 2 â€” PROMOTE PUBLISH_QUEUE BATCH 14: SocialFi Creator Tokens + Crypto Options Strategies â†’ PUBLISHED_PAGES immediately after index.lock clears. The options strategies page is directly relevant to Thursday's $14B expiry. SocialFi fills a zero-coverage gap in a $2.4B sector. Move queue â†’ published â†’ commit â†’ deploy.

PRIORITY 3 â€” THURSDAY CONVERGENCE FINAL PREP: 33 hours to the biggest convergence event since FTX: $14B options expiry + SEC rules on 91 ETFs for 24 tokens. Ensure all catalyst-relevant pages are live: fear-greed-timeline, options-calculator, crypto-options-strategies-guide, etf-guide, sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide. Community should have social posts pre-loaded. If even half the 91 ETFs are approved, alt season begins and our 531-page surface area becomes critical.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: The F&G conflicting data (11-14 vs 35) suggests we're at an inflection point â€” either sentiment is recovering or still bottoming. Either way, $313B stablecoin ATH = massive dry powder waiting. The SEC commodity classification of 16 assets on Mar 17 was the structural unlock; Mar 27 is the ETF execution day. If BTC reclaims $75K post-options and ETFs are approved, crypto search volume will spike 3-5x. Our content surface area needs to be LIVE before that moment arrives.
